headline: Is Five Below, Inc. (FIVE) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is FIVE a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Five Below, Inc. on r/investing_discussion by Variant_Invest. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on FIVE. Five Below, Inc.’s share was trading at $190.83 as of June 9th. FIVE’s trailing and forward P/E were 24.06 and 20.45 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Dollar General Sales Are Soaring. Is the Discount Retailer's Stock a Buy in 2026?
summary: Most investors fear lingering inflation will chip away at Dollar General's foot traffic, which has defied the odds so far.
